footer.description: Ikigo cy'Igihugu gishinzwe guteza imbere Ubuhinzi n'Ubworozi (RAB) giherereye mu Mujyi wa Sarajevo mu Mujyi wa Kigali Twubaka software yihariye, ibisubizo bya AI / ML, ubwubatsi bw'ibicu, na sisitemu ya automation.

header.description: Uhereye ku iterambere rya software y'ubucuruzi n'ubwenge bw'ubucuruzi bukoreshwa na AI kugeza ku bikorwa remezo by'igicu n'ibisubizo bya IoT - dutanga serivisi zuzuye z'ikoranabuhanga zitera guhanga udushya no kwihutisha iterambere.
